title: Chennai Vada Chennai Madras Lyrics Madras Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Madras
Singer(s):  Hariharasudhan, Meenakshi Iyer
Movie: Madras (2014)
Music: Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Kabilan

Chennai vada chennai , Chennai vada chennai
indha karuppar thamizh manna, karuppar thamizh manna
yaaro isaippaaro, chennai vada chennai
enga vera asaippaaro, vera asaippaaro

Enga ooru madras-u
idhukku naanga thaaney address-u. (2)
Chennai vada chennai
karuppar thamizh manna

Mullu thatcha koottukulla
kaakkaa kunjaa vazndhaa kooda
palli koodam pulla pola thulli kudhippom.

Mottamaadi mela naanga
thotti chedi pola ellaam kottamaaga
koodi vazhum kaattu maramthaan.

Ribbon building high courtellaam
sengalum mattumalla
engaloda raththamum serndhirukkudaa.

Kattupaadu pottu neenga
engalaththaan katti vacha
sattimolam pola naanga saththam poduvom.

Kavala kadhava odaikkum
karuviyaa iruppom.
ada irukkum idaththil irundhe
paravayaa parappom. (2)

Enga ooru madras-u
idhukku naanga thaaney address-u. (2)

Kamarukattu kannukaari thimirukittu pogumpodhu
amarankitta sonna kadhal kondaattamthaan.

Kaal pandhu kuththu sanda
carompodu kapadi ellaam
engaloda veeram sollu vilayattuthaan.

Band-u saththam, tape-u saththanm
gaana paaattu kaadha suththum
aaga moththam vazhuvomey idaiyoduthan.

Poster otti pandhal pottum
koottam kootti ottu pottum
yemaattramey enga panpaaduthaan.

Uzhaikkum inamey ulagai
jeithidum oru naal.
viliththu irundhaal viraivil
varumey andha thirunaal. (2)

Enga ooru madras-u
idhukku naanga thaaney address-u. (2)

Chennai vada chennai , Chennai vada chennai
indha karuppar thamizh manna, karuppar thamizh manna
yaaro isaippaaro, chennai vada chennai
enga vera asaippaaro, vera asaippaaro

Enga ooru madras-u
idhukku naanga thaaney address-u. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates the spirit of Chennai, highlighting its culture and pride through energetic lyrics.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Madras, the song reflects the protagonist's connection to the city and its vibrant life.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharasudhan and Meenakshi Iyer.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by Santhosh Narayanan, known for his innovative sound.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 24, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Chennai Vada Chennai from the movie Madras is a lively tribute to the city of Chennai, encapsulating its vibrant culture and spirit. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and pride among listeners, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The energetic duet by Hariharasudhan and Meenakshi Iyer, combined with Kabilan's impactful lyrics, creates a memorable experience. This song not only entertains but also connects deeply with the audience's love for their city.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chennai Vada Chennai from Madras is a vibrant anthem that captures the essence of the city with its infectious energy. The unique collaboration of Hariharasudhan and Meenakshi Iyer, under the masterful direction of Santhosh Narayanan, brings a fresh sound that resonates with every Tamilian. This song is not just a melody; it's a celebration of culture and pride.
stanzaMeanings: Chennai, oh Chennai, this black Tamil land, who sings here, Chennai, oh Chennai, do we have any other hopes?
Our town is Madras, this is our address. (2) Chennai, oh Chennai, this black Tamil land.
Even if a crow comes into a thorny bush, we will drink like kids in a school.
Like a thorny tree that we touch, we all live together as one.
The ribbon building and the high court, not just the buildings, our blood is mixed in them.
By putting up a barricade, you have built a wall, we will raise our voices like a loud shout.
We will be there with a worry, we will fly from this place.
Our town is Madras, this is our address. (2)
When the Kamarukattu girl leaves with pride, it is a celebration of love told to the sky.
When the time comes, we will show our bravery with our fights and cars.
With the sound of the band, the sound of the tape, we will sing and live together, all of us united.
The group that puts up posters and banners, we will all come together and make our mark.
One day, hard work will conquer the world. If we call out, that day will surely come. (2)
Our town is Madras, this is our address. (2)
Chennai, oh Chennai, this black Tamil land, who sings here, Chennai, oh Chennai, do we have any other hopes?
Our town is Madras, this is our address. (2)
